name: threejs
description: Three.js best practices: WebGPURenderer-first with automatic WebGL2 fallback (WebGPU is Baseline since Jan 2026), TSL shaders, react-three-fiber/drei integration, asset pipelines (glTF/Draco/KTX2), disposal and leak discipline, render-loop and draw-call performance, version-aware against the locked three revision. Includes /threejs:review.
